summary: One-button no-spend chain (enrich -> grade -> tier -> export) plus the post-dial loop: call outcomes, DNC verdict persistence, absolute do-not-call enforcement, and dashboard follow-ups.

files.role: stage manifest + presets + sequential child-process orchestrator (PIPELINE_RUN=1 HALT bypass)
9 dial outcomes -> derived next actions; do_not_call sets outreach_suppressed
source-attributed DNC verdicts; stale clear degrades to unchecked (deny-by-default)
skip-trace export; suppressed properties excluded entirely
Fill tab: run/poll UI, filter bar, Outcome column, coverage line

routes.summary: start a background run (409 if one is in flight)
enrichment coverage + dial activity from the last build
record a dial outcome (validates required facts)
current verdict for a phone (or stats)

tests.role: manifest integrity, presets (local = offline-only), CLI-arg threading
outcome validation, required facts, sticky do_not_call
verdict round-trip, staleness degradation, listed never expires
boots the REAL server: pipeline surface, pro-queue no-503, redacted ankhor export

tables.name: pipeline_runs
tables.role: one row per run; stages_json live progress; boot reconciliation marks zombies interrupted

tables.name: call_outcomes
tables.role: post-dial paper trail; outreach_suppressed is the absolute do-not-call flag

tables.name: pro_queue
tables.role: tiered queue the Fill tab reads

docs.role: feature doc: stages, presets, post-processing filters

audit_findings.finding: P1 #2 (DNC persistence) and P1 #4 (call outcome model) — both built in the 2026-07-02 session
the money workflow previously stopped before phone acquisition; the dial loop now exists end-to-end, gated on operational skiptrace/DNC spend

next_actions.action: fund a skip-trace provider and run the gated export (401 pay_to_unlock)
next_actions.note: operational, not code — see LOOP_PROMPT frontier #0
